Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives one clean, consolidated output covering the entire two-piece rotor market landscape without manually aggregating data from multiple sources.

Meta Investigation.action: Connects to all active Meta and TikTok ad campaigns and retrieves the full ad copy, headlines, and body text across every live creative.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility across the entire active ad library without requiring anyone to manually open and read each individual ad in the platform.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all retrieved ad copy for specific target phrases and flags every match, recording the exact field, ad ID, and verbatim copy where each phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, auditable record of flagged language across hundreds of ads in seconds, removing the risk of human review missing instances buried in large ad libraries.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends an email report listing every flagged ad with the specific field, the matched phrase, and the exact copy where it appeared.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable compliance or review report directly in the recipient's inbox on demand, enabling fast decisions without any platform log-in required.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline is moving strong — we're now tracking **53 total agents**, with **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we welcomed two new additions to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen agent targeting local businesses for the 13140 Midway Place warehouse sublet, and the **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC brands. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to **Completed** this week — great work to everyone involved in getting that across the finish line. The pipeline continues to grow and deliver, and we're excited about the momentum heading into the weeks ahead!
